differential_diagnoses: Nutritional optic neuropathy (multiple deficiencies, including B12 and copper)
next_steps: Obtain serum vitamin levels: retinol, retinol-binding protein, Vitamin B12, copper, ceruloplasmin, zinc, and Vitamin C.
Emergent ophthalmic evaluation including specialized assessment for xerophthalmia and corneal integrity.
Initiate therapeutic supplementation of Vitamin A and other identified micronutrient deficiencies under strict medical supervision.
Complete blood count and metabolic panel to screen for systemic markers of severe malnutrition and anemia.
Referral to registered dietitian for intensive nutritional counseling and management of avoidant/restrictive food intake disorder (ARFID).
Neuro-ophthalmology consultation to monitor recovery of optic nerve function.
